GpuProjectExec: expr=[customer_id@0 as customer_id, customername@1 as customername]
  GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [c_customer_id@2 ASC]
    GpuSortExec: expr=[c_customer_id@2 ASC], fetch=100
      GpuProjectExec: expr=[c_customer_id@0 as customer_id, concat(concat(coalesce(c_last_name@2, ), , ), coalesce(c_first_name@1, )) as customername, c_customer_id@0 as c_customer_id]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=9942053
          GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(cd_demo_sk@3, sr_cdemo_sk@0)], projection=[0, 1, 2]
            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=9942053
              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([cd_demo_sk@3], 8), input_partitions=8

                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ib_income_band_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8

                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=9942053

                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([hd_income_band_sk@4], 8), input_partitions=8

--- memory ---
GpuProjectExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=216
  GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=96, subtree_max_row_bytes=216
    GpuSortExec: row_width=96, subtree_max_row_bytes=216
      GpuProjectExec: row_width=96, subtree_max_row_bytes=216
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=96, subtree_max_row_bytes=216
          GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=96, subtree_max_row_bytes=216

              GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=100, subtree_max_row_bytes=216

                  GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=100, subtree_max_row_bytes=216

                              GpuScanExec: row_width=12, subtree_max_row_bytes=12
